projects.name: Personal Portfolio Site

projects.name: UI Component Library
projects.summary: CSS-only reusable component library (buttons, cards, modals, tooltips) published to npm with zero JavaScript dependencies. All components meet WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards. Demonstrates advanced CSS expertise and accessibility knowledge.

projects.name: Landing Page Clones
projects.summary: Pixel-perfect recreations of Stripe, Linear, and Vercel landing pages using only HTML and CSS. Focused on mastering flexbox, grid, custom properties, and CSS animations without frameworks.

projects.name: Framer Motion Showcase
projects.summary: Collection of React page transition animations exploring Framer Motion animation APIs. Pure frontend exploration project with no backend or data persistence.
